candidates.why: Exact match for total current assets on the balance sheet.
Not current assets; included only because it appeared in shortlist.

variables.notes: Selected the exact total current assets line.

candidates.row_label: Cash at bank and on hand
candidates.why: Best balance-sheet cash and cash equivalents type line; aligns closely with cash on hand and at bank.
Similar cash label but appears blank in preview and is less clearly the active reported line.
Component/other category rather than main total cash line.
Restricted cash is generally excluded from CHE.

candidates.row_label: Cash retained in the commercial pools
candidates.why: Could be cash-related but appears to be a component, not the main cash and cash equivalents total.

candidates.row_label: Cash and cash equivalents at end of the financial period
candidates.why: Cash flow statement ending cash, but CHE should come from balance sheet when available.

final_choice.row_label: Cash at bank and on hand

variables.notes: Preferred the balance-sheet cash line and excluded restricted cash. Although balance-sheet cash does not equal cash-flow ending cash in some years, 'Cash at bank and on hand' is still the best direct balance-sheet CHE label available.

candidates.why: Exact match for total current liabilities on the balance sheet.
Not current liabilities; included only because it appeared in shortlist.

variables.notes: Selected the exact total current liabilities line.

candidates.row_label: Short-Term Debt & Current Portion of Long-Term Debt
candidates.why: Exact match for short-term debt/current portion of long-term debt. Preferred as clean total and better than summing components. Although separate lease liability rows exist, this line is the reported current debt total and is the best available STD label.

candidates.row_label: Increase in short-term debt to associates
candidates.why: Cash flow item, not a balance-sheet stock measure for STD.

variables.notes: R:c. Used the clean total current debt line. Did not add 'Bank borrowings' or lease-related rows to avoid double counting. Baseline excludes leases, but no cleaner non-lease current debt total is available; this is still the best reported STD proxy.

candidates.why: Direct match for current taxes payable/current tax liabilities on the balance sheet.

variables.notes: Chosen outside the shortlist; confident because it is a direct current tax payable/liability label.

candidates.why: Exact total net PPE line; best match for PPEGT.
Only a component of PPE, not total.

variables.notes: Preferred the reported total net PPE line.

candidates.why: Exact match for total assets on the balance sheet.

variables.notes: Selected the exact total assets line.

candidates.row_label: Net cash provided by operating activities
candidates.why: Exact match for operating cash flow / net cash from operating activities.

final_choice.row_label: Net cash provided by operating activities

variables.notes: Selected the exact operating cash flow line.
